title: Parse On-Call Schedule
description:
Input: schedule lines as `name,start_unix,end_unix`, then `---`, then the query timestamp.

Return the name of the first on-call engineer whose window [start, end] includes the timestamp. Return `none` if nobody is on call at that time.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: Timestamp in alice's window
